channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Mets look for biggest comeback yet after falling behind Dodgers 3-1 in NLCS
item.description: The New York Mets insist their greatest rebound of 2024 may be yet to come after they dropped into a 3-1 NL Championship Series deficit with a 10-2 dud against the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Fry's 2-run homer in 10th sends Guardians to stunning 7-5 win over Yankees, close to 2-1 in ALCS
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Jhonkensy Noel saved Cleveland's season. David Fry extended it. With two huge swings, the Guardians hit back at the big, bad New York Yankees and tightened an AL Championship Series that was just about over.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sean Payton triumphs in return to New Orleans as the Broncos dominate the Saints, 33-10
item.description: Javonte Williams rushed for two touchdowns and the Denver Broncos triumphed in coach Sean Payton’s return to New Orleans, beating the banged-up and reeling Saints 33-10.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Judge's clutch homer becomes footnote as Guardians walk-off Game 3 of ALCS with 2-run shot in 10th
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Aaron Judge finally delivered the kind of postseason moment in October that turns Yankees into legends. It became a footnote when New York's bullpen blew up.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Dallas Stars sign goalie Jake Oettinger to an 8-year, $66 million extension
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jake Oettinger needed a new contract, and while the Dallas Stars knew they could play out the season and figure it out next summer, they wanted no part of that. They were willing to wait a little bit to lock up their No. 1 goaltender, and that patience paid off.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Taylor Pendrith shoots 61 in first start since the Presidents Cup and leads in Las Vegas
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — Taylor Pendrith took two weeks off after the Presidents Cup and didn't miss a beat, matching his career-low on the PGA Tour with a 10-under 61 that gave him a three-shot lead in the Shriners Children's Open on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: All-Star 1B Freddie Freeman out of Dodgers' lineup for Game 4 of NLCS against Mets
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — All-Star first baseman Freddie Freeman was out of the Los Angeles Dodgers' starting lineup for Game 4 of the National League Championship Series against the New York Mets. Freeman has been playing with a badly sprained and swollen right ankle throughout the postseason.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A Canadian former Olympic snowboarder is wanted in a US drug trafficking case
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A former Olympic snowboarder for Canada has been charged with running a drug trafficking ring that shipped vast amounts of cocaine across the Americas and killed four people, authorities said Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Virginia head coach Tony Bennett suddenly retiring, just weeks before season starts
item.description: With roughly three weeks before the Virginia Cavaliers begin their season, the school announced head coach Tony Bennett will retire, effective Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: The domed ballpark would have a 373,000-square-foot footprint and is expected to reach a height of 320 feet.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, NewsNation

item.title: Emma Hayes names USWNT roster for first matches since winning gold at the Olympics
item.description: Trinity Rodman will miss a trio of upcoming matches for the U.S. women's national soccer team as she continues to recover from a back injury. Coach Emma Hayes named her roster Thursday for games against Iceland on Oct. 24 in Austin, Texas, and Oct. 27 in Nashville.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL legend Troy Aikman rips 'lazy' Cowboys wide receivers after blowout loss
item.description: Troy Aikman didn't mince words when talking about the Dallas Cowboys' season on Thursday and he ripped the team's wide receivers in the process.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Week 8 picks: Oddsmakers don’t know what to make of the Big 12, either
item.description: The betting lines for Big 12 games are generally smaller than in either the Big Ten or SEC, which reflects the parity in the conference.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets' Davante Adams thinks Raiders in 'better place' after blockbuster trade
item.description: New York Jets star wide receiver Davante Adams opened up about the trade from the Las Vegas Raiders on Wednesday. He said he thinks the Raiders are "in a better place.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Criticism sparked over Snapdragon Stadium field conditions
item.description: The San Diego Wave FC lost 1-0 to Mexico’s Club America Wednesday. Both teams are advancing to the semifinals, but it was the turf that was the talk of the tailgate.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Ex-NBA star doesn't think Lakers are 'serious anymore' after low-key offseason, drafting Bronny James
item.description: Former NBA star DeMarcus Cousins was critical of the Los Angeles Lakers' offseason decision-making on Tuesday after the team brought in Bronny James.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Senate hopeful Sam Brown, Tulsi Gabbard show support for Nevada women's volleyball team amid SJSU trans drama
item.description: Nevada GOP Senate candidate Sam Brown and former Rep. Tulsi Gabbard showed support for Nevada women's volleyball players after some refuse to play against a transgender opponent.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani homers as the Dodgers rout the Mets 8-0 for a 2-1 lead in the NLCS
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — By the time Shohei Ohtani stepped to the plate in the eighth inning Wednesday night, the Los Angeles Dodgers were already in control. Once the ball left his bat, Game 3 of the National League Championship Series was over.
item.dc:creator: MIKE FITZPATRICK, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: A German in charge of England? Nationality matters less than it used to in international soccer
item.description: The question was inevitable. At his first news conference as England’s newly appointed head coach, Thomas Tuchel – a German – was asked on Wednesday what message he had for fans who would have preferred an Englishman in charge of their beloved national team.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lonzo Ball makes long-awaited return from knee injuries, scores 10 in Bulls' preseason game
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — When the moment finally arrived, after multiple knee surgeries and one grueling rehab, Lonzo Ball raised his right arm and blew a kiss to the cheering United Center crowd. Fans rose to their feet as the announcement echoed through the arena: “Checking in for the Chicago Bulls! No.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ionescu's 3-pointer with 1 second left gives Liberty 80-77 win over Lynx and 2-1 lead in WNBA Finals
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Sabrina Ionescu watched Breanna Stewart carry the New York Liberty all game, until it was time to win it. Then the ball was hers. “In the timeout, (coach) Sandy (Brondello) was like, ‘You’re going to shoot the shot,'" Ionescu said.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Grand Junction's Luis Mendez is a goal machine
item.description: Through 11 games this season, Grand Junction has scored 37 goals. Luis Mendez has 28 of them. 28 goals in 11 games.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Breanna Stewart helps New York even WNBA Finals series as Liberty beat Lynx 80-66 in Game 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart wasn't going to let history repeat itself. With the Minnesota Lynx making another fourth quarter run, the two-time league MVP refused to let the New York Liberty lose again.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5
